nasb.text: Then Ziba said to the king, “According to all that my lord the king commands his servant so your servant will do.” So Mephibosheth ate at David’s table as one of the king’s sons.

esv.text: Then Ziba said to the king, “According to all that my lord the king commands his servant, so will your servant do.” So Mephibosheth ate at David’s table, like one of the king’s sons.

cnv.text: 洗巴對王說：“我主我王吩咐僕人的一切，僕人都必遵行。”於是米非波設與大衛同桌吃飯，像是王的一個兒子一樣。

ccb.text: 洗巴对王说：“仆人必遵行我主我王的一切吩咐。”于是，米非波设像王子一样常与大卫同席吃饭。
